User request: Redesign a mobile-first push-to-talk team radio PWA called Talkie. Make it feel like a polished operational communications tool: dark, tactile, high-contrast, fast to scan, with a confident central talk action, compact channel joining, private channel PIN support, recent channels, live participants, chat, and replay affordances. Preserve the existing emerald radio accent and practical app feel, but give the interface richer hierarchy, stronger surfaces, and iOS install-ready polish.
